!!{{!!title}} --- {{!!points}} points

{{||CharacteristicsTable}}

''Unit Composition'': 1 {{!!title}}

{{||$:/templates/biomorphs-rules}}

;Options
*May take {{Wings||$:/templates/tooltips}} --- 5 points
*Psyker Mastery Level 1 --- 30 points
**A Tyranid Prime with a Pysker Mastery Level generates its powers from the ''Biomancy'', {{Broodmind||$:/templates/tooltips}}, {{Powers of the Hive Mind||$:/templates/tooltips}}, and ''Telepathy'' disciplines.
**Psyker Mastery Level 2 --- 30 points
***Psyker Mastery Level 3 --- 30 points
*May take items from the {{Basic Bio-cannons||$:/templates/tooltips}}, {{Basic Bio-weapons||$:/templates/tooltips}}, {{Melee Bio-weapons||$:/templates/tooltips}}, {{Biomorphs||$:/templates/tooltips}}, and {{Tyranid Bio-artefacts||$:/templates/tooltips}} lists.
title: Tyranid Prime
creator: Jeanbeaux
